verb לפאר

to adorn, decorate; praise, glorify

verb פואר

verb להתפאר

to boast, be proud

verb לפאר ( >>פיאר)

to adorn, decorate; praise, glorify

masculine noun

luxury, magnificence, grandeur, stateliness, gloriousness, splendor, grandioseness, grandiosity, luxuriance, luxuriousness, pomp, poshness, richness, state, sumptuousness, flower
